title: (Legacy) Cake's Cosmetics
description: (Legacy mod, Check mod description) A Mod that adds a variety of vanity items for the player to wear!
body:
# Cake's Cosmetics is now [Accents](https://modrinth.com/mod/accents) 
There is a new mod called [Accents](https://modrinth.com/mod/accents), which is a successor to Cake's Cosmetics and the one I'll be working on now. **This mod is now considered legacy**, so I recommend you check out the new mod for updates and more!

---

## Cake's Cosmetics adds a variety of vanity items that can be equipped into armor slots to provide a decorative flair to your Minecraft Avatar in-game. 
**[Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) is highly recommended to be used alongside this mod**

To start, you'll need to craft The Sewing Table with two string, some wooden planks, polished deepslate and carpets. Once you've crafted a Sewing Table, be sure to craft yourself some Sewing Kits using a stick, two string, and three iron nuggets. 

![The Crafting recipes for the sewing kit and the sewing table.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddd751a46f20ee9f4333e87838a49233f67aaf81.png)

You can use Sewing Kits at Sewing Tables to craft various Cosmetics. **Try them out and find your favorite!**

![The image shows all of the cosmetics from the mod](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1263/898/2025-07-23_15-11-36-png.png)

### Bugs and Suggestions
If you have found any bugs in the mod or want to make a suggestion, then join our Discord server and tell us! You can find the invite in the links tab.
